SEARCH
Package org.atmosphere.cpr

Interface ClusterBroadcastFilter

All Superinterfaces:
BroadcastFilter, BroadcastFilterLifecycle
public interface ClusterBroadcastFilter extends BroadcastFilterLifecycle
Specialize BroadcastFilter used when clustering is enabled.
